title: MeshBodyDisplayOverrides Object
description: Container for overrides that control how the mesh is displayed in the interactive 3D view.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

properties.name: isSuppressFaceGroupColors
properties.description: Controls whether the mesh body face group colors are shown. If set to true, the face groups will be shown with the assigned appearance, ignoring the current display settings.

properties.name: isSuppressTriangleEdges
properties.description: Controls whether the edges of the triangles of the mesh body are shown. If set to true, individual triangles will not be visible, edges of face groups (if any) will be shown instead.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

classType.title: MeshBodyDisplayOverrides.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

isSuppressFaceGroupColors.title: MeshBodyDisplayOverrides.isSuppressFaceGroupColors Property
isSuppressFaceGroupColors.description: Controls whether the mesh body face group colors are shown. If set to true, the face groups will be shown with the assigned appearance, ignoring the current display settings.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = meshBodyDisplayOverrides_var.isSuppressFaceGroupColors

# Set the value of the property.
meshBodyDisplayOverrides_var.isSuppressFaceGroupColors = propertyValue

isSuppressTriangleEdges.description: Controls whether the edges of the triangles of the mesh body are shown. If set to true, individual triangles will not be visible, edges of face groups (if any) will be shown instead.

# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = meshBodyDisplayOverrides_var.isSuppressTriangleEdges

# Set the value of the property.
